Bulk Editor — Items & Composite Items
📥 Download
Export all items and composite items to a CSV. Open it in Excel or Google Sheets, edit prices, costs, or any field, then upload it back.
Columns: type, id, sku, name, category, brand, unit, costPrice, salePrice, reorderPt, status, description
📤 Upload Changes
Upload the edited CSV. Only cells you changed will be applied — blank cells and unchanged values are ignored. Matched by SKU (or id if SKU missing).
📂
Click or drag & drop CSV
Only the exported CSV format is supported
Warehouse Stock Update
Select a warehouse above to view and edit stock quantities.
SKUNameCategoryCurrent QtyNew Qty

📊 Sales Reports
🛒 Purchase Reports
📦 Inventory Reports
Report
🔒
All integrations are read-only. Data flows into Yoro Inventory PRO only — no changes are ever pushed back to connected platforms.
📦 Products → Items
Never synced

Pulls all Shopify products and variants into the Items list. Matches by SKU — won't create duplicates.

🛒 Orders → Sales Orders
Never synced

Pulls Shopify orders and maps them to Sales Orders. Matches by order number — safe to re-run.

👤 Customers
Never synced

Imports your Shopify customer list. Matches by email — updates existing records automatically.

Products + Orders + Customers in sequence
🔗 Pending SKU Mappings
Map unrecognized Shopify SKUs to Hey Honey items — held orders release automatically
🚢 ShipStation → Shipment Sync
Fulfillment write · Strict ID matching only

Pulls shipped orders from ShipStation, matches them to inventory orders using exact unique IDs, updates order status + tracking, then marks Shopify orders as fulfilled and triggers customer shipping email.
Matching rule: only updates Shopify if a verified ShipStation→Inventory→Shopify ID chain exists. No fuzzy matching allowed.

Never synced
📋 Shipment Sync Audit Log
Ready — click Sync Shipments to pull shipped orders from ShipStation.
✅ Shopify write scope: write_fulfillments
Only creates fulfillments on Shopify orders. No other write access is granted or used.
Deduplication: checks shopifyFulfillmentId before writing.
🔒 Matching priority (strict, no fuzzy)
1. ShipStation orderId → inventory ssOrderId
2. ShipStation orderKey → inventory key pattern
3. ShipStation orderNumber → inventory soNo (exact)
Sync Log
Ready — click a sync button above to start.
⚠️ About CORS: The Shopify Admin API may block direct browser requests when this file is opened locally. If you see a network error, you'll need a free Cloudflare Worker proxy. Click here for the 5-minute setup guide →
🔗 Zoho Inventory — Live Pull
Read-only · Manual import Checking…
Connect once — Claude will refresh the token automatically.
⏳ Fetching from Zoho…
📦 Amazon FBA Integration
Read-only · Import only Coming Soon
Customer Name
Amazon FBA
All Amazon orders link to a single "Amazon FBA" customer record
Order Number Prefix
AM-{order_number}
e.g. AM-111-2345678-9012345
Product Mapping
SKU only
Unrecognized SKUs go to the pending mapping list
Shipping name and address will be pulled from each Amazon order's shipping details, not from the customer record.

Invoice
Sales Order
Purchase Order

SMTP & Task Digest
SMTP Settings
For Gmail: use an App Password (Google Account → Security → 2-Step Verification → App Passwords). Never use your main password.
Scheduled Task Digests
📬 Each user receives only their own assigned tasks. You (admin) receive the full list. Set up to 3 send times per day.
18:00 AM EST
21:00 PM EST
Server runs on UTC. EST = UTC − 5.
📱 SMS Notifications (Email-to-Text)
Send task reminders as text messages using your carrier's email-to-SMS gateway — no extra service needed.
Common gateways: AT&T: number@txt.att.net · Verizon: number@vtext.com · T-Mobile: number@tmomail.net
Enter your 10-digit number + carrier gateway. Example: 9415550000@vtext.com

Tag NameOptionsActions
